name: Bottle
description: An old bottle that survived the ages, the contents placed inside become enchanted.

abilities.name: Regenerate
abilities.description: Restores health and replenishes mana for a while, by increasing health and mana regeneration. Number of Charges: 3. Cooldown: 0.5. Cast Range: 350. Total Heal: 110. Total Mana Restore: 60. Regen Duration: 2.7. Restores all charges while within the Fountain area. Restores all charges when respawning on the Ofrenda.

abilities.name: Store Rune
abilities.description: Couriers can neither activate nor store runes. Cast Range: 150. Max Store Rune Duration: 90.
